hero.tagline: DESIGNING THE FUTURE, ONE EVENT AT A TIME
hero.subtitle: Join us in creating unforgettable moments and connecting communities through world-class events

agora_events.title: AGORA Events
agora_events.about_desc: AGORA Events is a leading event management company dedicated to creating exceptional experiences that bring people together and transform communities.
agora_events.vision_desc: To be the premier event management platform that inspires innovation, fosters community connections, and creates lasting memories through transformative experiences.
agora_events.mission_desc: To design and deliver world-class events that exceed expectations, create meaningful connections, and drive positive impact in communities worldwide.
agora_events.value_excellence_desc: We strive for the highest standards in everything we do
agora_events.value_transparency_desc: We operate with honesty and integrity in all dealings
agora_events.value_innovation_desc: We embrace creativity and continuous improvement
agora_events.value_fairplay_desc: We ensure equal opportunities for all participants
agora_events.value_community_desc: We create positive social and economic impact
agora_events.partners_subtitle: Leading organizations trust us to deliver excellence
agora_events.contact_message: Have a question or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you!
agora_events.faq_q1: How can I become a partner?
agora_events.faq_a1: Contact our partnerships team with your proposal. We evaluate all opportunities for mutual benefit and community impact.
agora_events.faq_a2: We organize corporate events, conferences, competitions, festivals, and community gatherings of all sizes.
agora_events.faq_q3: Can I register for multiple events?
agora_events.faq_a3: Yes! You can participate in as many of our events as you wish. Each registration is independent.
agora_events.faq_q4: How do I get updates about upcoming events?
agora_events.faq_a4: Subscribe to our newsletter and follow our social media channels for the latest announcements.
agora_events.faq_a5: Refund policies vary by event. Please check the specific event terms or contact our support team.
agora_events.faq_a6: You can reach us via email, phone, or our contact form on this website.

circuit.title: AGORA University Circuit
circuit.tagline: L'Ascension Commence Ici - The Ascension Begins Here
circuit.subtitle: Compete monthly. Earn points. Climb the rankings.
circuit.monthly_desc: Teams compete in monthly tournaments. Top performers qualify for the Grand Showdown.
circuit.points_desc: Win points based on your performance. Cumulative points determine overall rankings.
circuit.grand_desc: Top teams from all months compete in the Grand Final for major prizes.
circuit.monthly_prizes_desc: Winners of each monthly competition receive exclusive prizes and points
circuit.grand_final_desc: Top 3 teams in the Grand Showdown compete for the championship title and premium rewards
circuit.name: Full Name
